instruction: Rita will spend ${\$150}$ to purchase some bowls and some plates. Each bowl costs ${\$1}$, and each plate costs ${\$6}$. The function $p(b)={-{\textstyle\frac{1}{6}}b+25}$ models the number of plates Rita to be purchase, where $b$ represents the number of bowls to be purchased. Interpret the meaning of $p(60)={15}$. [ANS] A. A. `15` bowls and `60` plates can be purchased. [ANS] B. B. `\$15` will be used to purchase bowls, and `\$60` will be used to purchase plates.  C. C. `60` bowls and `15` plates can be purchased.  D. D. `\$60` will be used to purchase bowls, and `\$15` will be used to purchase plates.
